product: Excel file format support is now available by default ​
tagline: July 7, 2026 Excel file format support is now available by default for all workspaces.
what_it_does: July 7, 2026 Excel file format support is now available by default for all workspaces. You can ingest, parse, and query .xls , .xlsx , and .xlsm files directly using built in support, without external libraries or manual conversions.
why_it_matters: Reduces operational overhead and unlocks new capabilities for data teams on Databricks.

capabilities.title: July 7, 2026 Excel
capabilities.desc: July 7, 2026 Excel file format support is now available by default for all workspaces.

key_takeaway: July 7, 2026 Excel file format support is now available by default for all workspaces.
